title: HTML to Text Cleaner
description: Extract clean text from HTML by removing JavaScript, CSS, and tracking tags. Perfect for RAG pipelines, LLM training data, and AI agent workflows. 281x faster than BeautifulSoup.

raw_payload.title: HTML Content
raw_payload.description:
Paste HTML content to clean. Example: '

Article Title

Content here

'

urls.title: URLs to Process
urls.description: Enter URLs to fetch and process. Example: ['https://example.com/article']

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Return language detection, word count, and processing time

removeScripts.title: Remove Scripts
removeScripts.description: Strip JavaScript and tracking scripts from HTML

removeStyles.title: Remove Styles
removeStyles.description: Strip CSS and style tags from HTML
